violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Cover containers of chicken marinade and cooked ground beef in walk in cooler. Cover/close bags to 3 large boxes of spices in BOH prep area.--Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Boxes of food items stored on floor of walk in cooler.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Rusty wire rack shelving unit in walk in cooler, duct tape repairs to prep station cutting board rail, & packing tape repair to cheese dispenser case. Items not properly repaired.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Walk in cooler wire rack shelving and dry storage area shelving need cleaning. Cheese dispenser has food debris build up and needs cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors have a build up of dust and debris under prep line and BOH cooking equipment. Clean along wall junctures.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Hole in wall near hand sink, hole in ceiling above soda machine, & peeling wall panel in BOH prep area need repair.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. Wet mop stored in utility sink. Store in a position that allows item to dry.
